title: Account → Play Warlords hub
delivery: One button routes signed-in players through character → island → 3D home island gameplay; unsigned users go to sign-in.
playerImpact: Account page and /home hub point at the real 3D home island (/home-island) instead of legacy 2D-only paths.
studioImpact: Same Grudge ID flows from id.grudge-studio.com → grudgewarlords.com → WCS → Puter without losing active character context.
flow: Ready → /home-island (1024m seed world, Colyseus, harvest HUD)
verify: Click Play — lands on correct step for account state
Readiness badges show Signed in / Hero ready / Home island
